arquivos_modificados.descricao: Added --database flag parsing, handleDatabaseAnalysis(), findSourceFiles() utility
Added test case for --database flag parsing

cli_enhancements.functionality: Scans project for N+1 queries, batch loading opportunities, ORM hints

implementation_details.main: ✅ Added database analysis in CLI flow
implementation_details.handleDatabaseAnalysis: ✅ New function that recursively scans source files and reports issues
implementation_details.findSourceFiles: ✅ Utility to find all .ts/.js/.tsx/.jsx files (excluding node_modules)
implementation_details.verbose_mode: ✅ Shows top 10 issues with detailed recommendations

features.orm_detection: ✅ Shows which ORM issues apply to (Prisma/TypeORM/Sequelize)
features.recommendations: ✅ Each issue includes specific fix recommendations
features.file_tracking: ✅ Shows file path and line number for each issue

notes: Database analysis now fully integrated into CLI. Users can analyze N+1 queries, batch loading opportunities, and ORM-specific hints from command line. Ready for Sprint 3 integration with correlation engine.
